subcodes.first_line: O Rafi'! God hath elevated the station of Him Who ascended unto God and was named the Most Great Victory in His perspicuous Book - the call of the Wronged One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا رفیعا قد رفع الله مقام من صعد الله و سمی بالفتح الاعظم فی کتابه المبین ندای مظلوم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih
